name: restaurant-top-nav
title: Draco Frosted-Glass Top Nav
description: Frosted-glass floating pill top nav with brand mark, eyebrow copy, and hamburger that opens a full-screen mobile drawer. Three variants: pills (scrolling tab row), segments (underline bar), more-sheet (collapses to bottom sheet). Server-side host picks variant at runtime from tenant config.

preview.reason: Imports Next Image with static paths, @/providers/TenantProvider, @/domains/shared/*, and @siso/ui primitives. Requires restaurant-app-solo tenant config to render. Preserved as code-reference.
